title: Add native snapshot compare to proposal apply preview
summary: Extend proposal artifact apply preview with a read-only native snapshot compare surface that shows the current matched scope, snapshot truth, preview coverage, and repository-backed source context.
acceptance_criteria: Proposal apply preview shows a current native snapshot compare section for matching component or view scopes.
The compare surface uses existing native document truth such as snapshot presence, preview coverage, and source path instead of invented diff state.
When no matching native scope or snapshot exists, the UI explains the gap truthfully instead of pretending an exact compare is available.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Proposal apply preview now includes a dedicated current native snapshot compare section that shows matched scope truth, preview coverage, structure counters, snapshot presence, and current source path.
When the current import or matching native scope is unavailable, the compare surface stays read-only and explains the gap instead of pretending an exact snapshot diff exists.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after the snapshot compare slice.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 item 1 after HS-0025: add the first read-only native compare surface between proposal artifact and current inspector snapshot.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Keep the compare surface read-only and explicitly tied to current native snapshot/source truth.
Prefer reusing existing proposal apply preview context instead of creating a parallel comparison workflow.
